arts.ttl: “Good result” | West Ham earn solid point at Bournemouth
arts.sum: West Ham earned a solid point against Bournemouth, but many of the same issues were still present. Many top teams have walked away from the Vitality with no points this season, so for a struggling West Ham to earn a draw is actually a very good result. arts.ttl: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola: West Ham penalty contradicted referees’ advice
arts.sum: Following VAR intervention, match official Chris Kavanagh penalised Tyler Adams after Aaron Wan-Bissaka’s cross brushed his outstretched arm.

arts.ttl: Iraola 'very disappointed' with VAR in West Ham draw
arts.sum: Andoni Iraola is unhappy with the video assistant referee following Monday's 1-1 draw with West Ham.
West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui praises his team's "remarkable" commitment in their 1-1 draw at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth 1-1 West Ham: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Unal rescues Cherries with stunning free-kick
arts.sum: Bournemouth's Enes Unal scores a stunning 90th-minute free-kick to rescue a point in Monday's Premier League home clash against West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Astonishing late drama as Bournemouth and West Ham share points
arts.sum: Bournemouth 1-1 West Ham: Enes Unal’s stunning free-kick cancelled out Lucas Paqueta’s penalty

arts.ttl: West Ham share points with Bournemouth after late drama on England's south coast
arts.sum: Enes Ünal scored a superb free kick in the last minute of normal time to rescue a point for Bournemouth in a 1-1 home draw against West Ham in the Premier League on Monday. “Credit to him, big moment, especially the reaction as well, I thought the boys were brilliant,” Bournemouth forward Ryan Christie told broadcaster Sky.

arts.ttl: Enes Unal nets sensational last-gasp free-kick as Bournemouth earn West Ham draw
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta’s contentious penalty looked to have snatched victory for the Hammers, three minutes from time before Enes Unal struck.
